commit.message:
fix: show bowling & fielding in player breakdown

- Bowling now shows whenever stats.bowling exists (not gated on sections)
- Added dot ball count display
- Fielding shows catches/stumpings/run-outs/assists without requiring sections
- Run-out assist (thrower) now shown separately

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Fix test result parsing: trust parsed counts over exit code

When dotnet test returns non-zero exit code (e.g., one test project
fails to build) but all parsed tests pass (0 failed, 204 passed),
the old logic incorrectly reported failure. This caused PE agents to
waste 3 fix attempts and then remove passing tests.

New logic: when test counts are successfully parsed from output,
trust them over the process exit code. Fall back to exit code only
when no test output can be parsed.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
release: v1.0.5 (#38)

* chore: update branching strategy and CI for release workflow

- CONVENTIONS.md: replace branch strategy with release-branch model
  (fix/* → release/X.Y.x → main, long-lived release branches)
- CI: add release/** to push and pull_request triggers
- Add version bump advisory and GitHub Releases policy

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: normalize warning_pct to 2 decimal places for lossless UI round-trip

The frontend form uses integers 0-100 but the backend stores 0-1 decimal.
Values with excess precision (e.g., 0.3333) would lose data on edit via
Math.round(). Adding a Pydantic field_validator with ROUND_HALF_UP on both
LimitCreate and LimitUpdate ensures the stored value always maps cleanly
to a whole percentage.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: draw continuous average trend line across sparse historical data

Use null instead of omitting the average property so Recharts
connectNulls draws a continuous dashed line through gaps. Also guard
the tooltip against null values to avoid showing misleading \.

Adds backend test documenting _average_series behavior with empty
periods (months with zero expenses are excluded from the average).

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: limit Insights transactions to first page with View all link (#27)

Remove infinite scroll from the Insights transaction panel. Only show
the first page (~20 items) and add a View all link that navigates to
/transactions with the current filters applied.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: send category filters in correct schema format when creating limits (#23)

Frontend was sending category_ids (ignored by Pydantic) instead of
filters: [{filter_type, filter_value}]. Also fixed edit form loading
f.id (filter record UUID) instead of f.filter_value (category UUID).

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: extend trend line to full period and use 1-based days (#26)

_to_cumulative now accepts period_days so the current series extends
to the end of the month/week even when there are no recent expenses.
get_day_of_period returns 1-based indices so the X-axis starts at
day 1 instead of misleading day 0.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: address review findings for trend line changes

- Update docstring and ARCHITECTURE.md to reflect 1-based day index
- Use public get_day_of_period instead of private _resolve_local_date
- Cap period_days as hard limit (ignore timezone-shifted outliers)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: send empty filters array when clearing category filter on edit

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: limit progress %, UUID display, filter update, and validation (#30)

- Multiply backend 0-1 progress ratio by 100 in limit-card and home
- Resolve category UUIDs to names via batch query (filter_display_name)
- Show 'Deleted category' instead of raw UUID for removed categories
- Add filters field to LimitUpdate schema with delete-all/re-insert
- Reject filters: null with 422 (explicit over silent)
- Validate category filter_value as UUID at schema boundary
- Guard against empty category_ids producing IN () that matches all
- Extract _resolve_filter_display for clarity over inline ternary

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* style: format files for CI

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: address PR review — type hints, corrupt filter guard, missing tests

- Add type annotations to create_limit and update_limit signatures
- Match nothing (not everything) when all category filter UUIDs are corrupt
- Add tests: invalid UUID rejection, filters=null 422, deleted category fallback

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: extend average trend line to full period, weekday labels, dynamic legend (#31)

- Pass current period_days to all historical _to_cumulative calls so
  average series always covers the full period (no early cutoff)
- Add timeframe to SpendingTrendResponse schema so frontend knows mode
- Weekly X-axis shows Mon-Sun instead of day numbers
- Weekly tooltip shows weekday name instead of Day N
- Legend shows 3-week avg vs 3-month avg based on timeframe
- Updated tests for normalized average behavior

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: constrain timeframe type, fix legend labels, remove unused prop

- Backend: Literal type for timeframe in SpendingTrendResponse
- Frontend: SpendingTrendTimeframe union type
- Legend now derives from data.timeframe (works for last_week, ytd too)
- Remove unused periodLabel prop from SpendingTrendChart
- Rename stale test to match updated behavior

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: average series normalization, yearly skip, period labels (#31)

- _average_series divides by total series count (not per-day count)
- Skip 3-year average for ytd (too expensive, not useful)
- Restore periodLabel for current-period display (This/Last week/month)
- Add PERIOD_DISPLAY and AVG_LABEL maps for all timeframes
- Conditionally render average Line and legend only when data exists
- Add test for yearly average skip
- Constrain timeframe to Literal type in schema

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: harden _average_series with carry-forward for short series

_average_series now fills missing trailing days by carrying forward
each series' last cumulative value. This guarantees the average never
decreases even if a caller passes un-normalized series, preventing
future regressions without relying on caller discipline.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* feat: shared period context across Home, Transactions, and Insights (#28)

Add PeriodProvider React context holding this_week/this_month. Home's
toggle writes to context. Transactions and Insights read it as their
default period, with local filter overrides taking precedence.

- Strip cleared filter values before merging so deselecting a chip
  falls back to globalPeriod instead of undefined
- hasFilters computed from local overrides only (not inherited period)
- Insights transaction cap reduced from 20 to 15
- Simplified Insights View all link (context handles period)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* feat: shared period context with localStorage, filter override isolation (#28)

Add PeriodProvider React context (this_week/this_month) persisted in
localStorage. Home toggle writes to context. Transactions and Insights
use it as default period for data queries.

- FilterBar sees localFilters directly (period chip fully interactive)
- queryFilters merges globalPeriod only when no local period is set
- hasFilters computed from local overrides only (no phantom Reset)
- usePeriod throws if called outside PeriodProvider
- Insights transactions capped at 15

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

---------

Update netlify/functions/campaign-blueprint-create.js

Co-authored-by: Copilot <175728472+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
[Internal] Tests: Refactors QueryTests to use async/await instead of sync-over-async (#5774)

`QueryTests.cs` contained 61 sync-over-async anti-patterns (50
`.Result`, 11 `.Wait()`) that risk deadlocks and obscure exceptions via
`AggregateException` wrapping.

## Changes

- **`void` → `async Task`** for test methods: `TestQueryWithPageSize`,
`TestLazyIndexAllTerms`, `TestQueryMetricsHeaders`,
`TestForceQueryScanHeaders`, `TestContinuationLimitHeaders`,
`TestQueryUnicodeDocumentHttpsGateway`
- **`void` → `async Task`** for private helpers: `CleanUp`,
`TestQueryUnicodeDocument`, and the private overloads of
`TestQueryMetricsHeaders`, `TestForceQueryScanHeaders`,
`TestContinuationLimitHeaders`
- **`TestInitialize` / `TestCleanup`** converted to `async Task` to
properly `await CleanUp()`
- **`RetryRateLimiting` → `AsyncRetryRateLimiting`** with async lambdas
wherever `.Result` appeared inside sync retry wrappers
- **`AggregateException` catch blocks** in
`TestContinuationLimitHeaders` replaced with `DocumentClientException` —
the unwrapped type thrown by `await`
- **`.Wait()` in already-async methods**
(`TestQueryForRoutingMapSanity`, `TestQueryParallelExecution`,
`TestReadFeedParallelQuery`) replaced with `await`

### Before / After

```csharp
// Before
Database database = TestCommon.RetryRateLimiting<Database>(() =>
    this.client.CreateDatabaseAsync(...).Result.Resource);

catch (AggregateException e) when (e.InnerException is DocumentClientException ex) { ... }

// After
Database database = await TestCommon.AsyncRetryRateLimiting<Database>(async () =>
    (await this.client.CreateDatabaseAsync(...)).Resource);

catch (DocumentClientException ex) { ... }
```

---------

Co-authored-by: copilot-swe-agent[bot] <198982749+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: kirankumarkolli <6880899+kirankumarkolli@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Kiran Kumar Kolli <kirankk@microsoft.com>

commit.message:
Add C++ from-scratch building-blocks series with user's actual code

6 blog posts using the user's real LibTorch transformer implementation:
- SingleHeadAttention: QKV projections, transpose(-2,-1) deep dive with
  interactive animation, causal masking, softmax
- MultiHeadAttention: vector of heads, concat, projection layer
- FeedForward: expand-compress with ReLU, position-wise independence
- TransformerBlock: pre-norm, residual connections, data flow animation
- PositionalEncoding: sinusoidal encoding line-by-line, heatmap animation
- GPT (Full Model): complete pipeline from token IDs to logits

Replaces old basic-blocks/ with building-blocks/ in navigation.
Updates from-scratch/cpp/index.html roadmap (all links active).

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: token self-healing and reconnect session ownership

- _resolve_token now prefers x_token refresh when available, with
  fallback to stored music token on non-auth errors (self-healing
  for expired tokens)
- _reconnect respects external HTTP session ownership instead of
  silently replacing it with a new internal session
- Add tests for both behaviors (TestResolveToken, TestReconnectSessionOwnership)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: handle lowercase CricAPI stat keys (r, b, o, w, m)

CricAPI responses sometimes use lowercase keys (r, b) instead of
uppercase (R, B) for runs, balls, overs, wickets, maidens. Our parser
only checked uppercase, causing runs/balls to show as 0 while fours/
sixes (keyed as '4s'/'6s') parsed correctly.

Added lowercase variants to both batting parser and bowling merger.

repository.name: Transformation_Portal

commit.message:
Fix aspire-managed macOS signing, permissions, and add CI verification (#16053)

* Add macOS JIT entitlements and ad-hoc codesign step for aspire-managed

macOS hardened runtime blocks CoreCLR JIT (W^X memory mapping) unless the
binary carries com.apple.security.cs.allow-jit and related entitlements.
MicroBuild's MacDeveloperHardenWithNotarization signing preserves
entitlements from a prior ad-hoc signature, so we codesign with the
entitlements plist before Arcade signing.

This follows the same pattern used by dotnet/sdk for Roslyn managed
binaries (roslyn-entitlements.plist).

Fixes https://github.com/microsoft/aspire/issues/16043

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Restore execute permissions on aspire-managed after MicroBuild signing

MicroBuild rewrites the binary file during signing, which resets Unix
file permissions to the default umask (typically 644). The execute bit
must be restored before CreateLayout packs the binary into the CLI
archive. Without this, macOS and Linux archives contain a non-executable
aspire-managed binary.

Fixes https://github.com/microsoft/aspire/issues/16043

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Narrow non-interactive cert trust skip to macOS and Windows only

Previously, CertificateService skipped the certificate trust operation
only on Windows in non-interactive mode. On macOS, the trust operation
would hang waiting for a Keychain password prompt in CI environments.

Broaden the skip to both macOS and Windows in non-interactive mode, but
allow Linux trust to proceed since it is non-interactive by nature
(update-ca-certificates does not prompt).

Remove the injected isWindows function in favor of direct
OperatingSystem.IsLinux() check, which is simpler and more correct.

Add a new test (EnsureCertificatesTrustedAsync_NonInteractiveNonWindows_
WithNotTrustedCert_SkipsTrustOperation) to validate the macOS CI
behavior, and update existing tests to be platform-aware.

Fixes https://github.com/microsoft/aspire/issues/16043

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Add CLI archive verification scripts

Add verify-cli-archive.sh (Linux/macOS) and verify-cli-archive.ps1
(Windows) scripts that validate a signed CLI archive by:
  1. Extracting the archive to a temp location
  2. Running 'aspire --version' to verify the binary executes
  3. Running 'aspire new aspire-starter' to test bundle self-extraction
     and project creation (exercises aspire-managed)
  4. Cleaning up temp state (backs up and restores ~/.aspire)

These scripts will be wired into the CI pipeline to catch signing and
permissions regressions before they reach users.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Wire CLI archive verification into CI pipelines

Add post-signing verification steps to both build_sign_native.yml
(macOS/Linux) and BuildAndTest.yml (Windows) that run the verification
scripts after the CLI archives are built and signed.

Verification runs for RIDs that can fully execute on the build agent:
  - macOS (Apple Silicon): osx-arm64 only
  - Linux (amd64): linux-x64 only
  - Windows: win-x64

This ensures that signing/permissions regressions (like the ones fixed
in this PR) are caught during the official build before release.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Address PR feedback: restore testability and fix scripts

- Restore mockable isNonInteractiveTrustSupported parameter in
  CertificateService for testability (was Func<bool> isWindows)
- Fix cert tests to use explicit mocks instead of OS-dependent assertions
- Move backup dir into VERIFY_TMPDIR to avoid orphaned temp dirs
- Fix BuildAndTest.yml comment to match actual script behavior

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Feat/permission levels 346 (#348)

* feat(auth): add optional permission levels (Issue #346)

* Initial plan (#347)

Co-authored-by: copilot-swe-agent[bot] <198982749+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix(auth): address PR review feedback - consistent error formats, test coverage, fix is_mutating_method

- Fix is_mutating_method to use reference patterns (&Method::POST | ...)
  instead of dereferencing (*method) as suggested by reviewer
- Add unauthorized_response() returning JSON AuthErrorResponse to match
  the format of permission_denied_response() (consistent 401/403 shape)
- Remove plain-text unauthorized() from middleware; import and use
  unauthorized_response() from handlers::auth throughout
- Add shared auth_test_mutex() and clear_stores_for_tests() as pub(crate)
  #[cfg(test)] helpers so middleware and handler tests share the same lock
- Add middleware_rejects_mutation_when_api_key_is_read_only: tests POST/
  PUT/PATCH/DELETE all return 403 for a ReadOnly API key
- Add middleware_rejects_mutation_when_forms_session_is_read_only: logs in
  with basic_permission_level=ReadOnly, asserts POST returns 403
- Protect middleware_allows_valid_forms_session_cookie_when_configured and
  middleware_allows_read_only_api_key_for_get_requests with the shared
  mutex + reset to prevent store-state leakage between parallel tests

Closes #346

commit.message:
fix: Card hover glow + group exams by category

- Fixed card hover: restricted transitions to border/shadow/transform only
  (was 'transition: all' which animated text color changes = glowing text)
- Shadow on hover is now dark (readable) not green-tinted
- Cards grouped by category with headings: ☁️ Azure (12), 🔒 Security (5), etc.
- Category order: Azure → AI → Security → M365 → Data → Power Platform → D365
- Each group has a heading with emoji + count

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat: セッション管理 - /session, /resume, /rename (#28)

- src/model/session/index.ts を新規作成
  - セッションを ~/.lcli/sessions/<uuid>/ に保存
  - meta.json (id, name, createdAt) + history.json の2ファイル構成
  - カレントセッションIDを ~/.lcli/current_session に永続化
  - initSession() で起動時に既存 chat_history.json を自動マイグレーション
  - findSession() でID前方一致またはセッション名（大小文字無視）で検索

- src/model/history/index.ts を更新
  - HISTORY_FILE ハードコードを廃止し、getCurrentHistoryPath() で動的取得
  - saveHistory() にディレクトリ自動作成を追加

- src/controller/command/sessionCommands.ts を新規作成
  - /session list  : 全セッション一覧（作成日時・メッセージ数・現在セッション表示）
  - /session new   : 新規セッション作成 + インメモリ履歴リセット
  - /resume [id|name] : セッション切り替え（現在履歴を保存してからロード）
  - /rename <name> : カレントセッション名を変更

- src/controller/command/index.ts を更新
  - /session, /resume, /rename コマンドをルーティングに追加

- src/controller/command/systemCommands.ts を更新
  - /help にセッション管理コマンド一覧を追加

- src/index.ts を更新
  - 起動時に initSession() を呼び出し
  - バナーにカレントセッション名・IDを表示

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

docs: Due Date カスタムフィールドの説明を追記

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

test: API integration tests + storage unit tests (#17)

* test: add API integration tests and storage unit tests

- Add src/lib.rs exposing pub modules and build_app() so integration tests
  can import from the library crate
- Refactor main.rs to delegate to rendition::build_app()
- Add tests/api_integration.rs with 7 axum-test cases covering health,
  404, PNG passthrough, webp format conversion, width resize, crop, and rotation
- Add #[cfg(test)] block in storage/mod.rs covering LocalStorage get/exists
  and all content_type_from_ext branches (jpeg, png, webp, svg, mp4, unknown)
- Thread original_content_type through transform::apply so format is
  preserved when no fmt param is supplied (PNG in → PNG out)
- Fix apply_resize: replace thumbnail_image_with_opts (broken with
  in-memory buffers) with ops::resize + extract_area; const VIPS_MAX_COORD
  avoids the i32::MAX GLib property range rejection
- Replace 1×1 placeholder assets/sample.png with a 64×64 8-bit sRGB image

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* chore: ignore .cargo/ and .claude/ worktree dirs

* fix: address PR review feedback - safe resize scales, isolated temp dirs, dimension assertions in tests

Agent-Logs-Url: https://github.com/ivanoats/rendition/sessions/80664cd9-85c9-4735-b999-0ee9e3dffb3e

Co-authored-by: ivanoats <4672+ivanoats@users.noreply.github.com>

* style: cargo fmt tests/api_integration.rs

CI's rustfmt --check failed on the merged file. No semantic changes.

* ci: disable sccache rustc-wrapper on CI runners

.cargo/config.toml sets rustc-wrapper = "sccache" for local-developer
build speed, but sccache is not installed on the GitHub Actions Ubuntu
runners, causing every cargo invocation (clippy, build, test) to fail
with "could not execute process `sccache ...`".

Override with CARGO_BUILD_RUSTC_WRAPPER="" in the workflow env so cargo
calls rustc directly on CI.

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Co-authored-by: copilot-swe-agent[bot] <198982749+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Remove dead Value::Function(String) variant

This enum variant was never constructed anywhere in the codebase.
Host functions are represented as VmObject with __host_fn__ key
(via make_host_fn) instead. Remove the variant and all associated
match arms across value.rs, vm.rs, and runner.rs (~245 lines).

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Add 81 unit tests to improve coverage

New test files covering:
- FakeSettingsRepository (test double validation)
- StreamQuality enum (fromOrdinal, labels, URLs)
- SirApp Application class (creation, StrictMode)
- PlaybackMode sealed interface (exhaustiveness)
- CircularByteBuffer edge cases (clear, seekBack, overflow)
- ServiceUtils extension function (intent creation)
- TimeShiftDataSource.Factory (instance tracking)
- StreamConfig constants (URL validation)
- RadioViewModel extended (state transitions, null safety)
- PlayerTestHelper (mock defaults)
- CastFeatureManager state machine (listener callbacks)

Total tests: 163 → 244 (50% increase)
Line coverage: 5.8% → 6.5%
Class coverage: 15.1% → 19.2%

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat: add player/clan search toggle with clan suggestions endpoint

- Add SearchModeToggle component (pill toggle, P/C hints, role=switch, tooltips)
- Rewrite HeaderSearch with dual-mode search (player/clan), debounced fetch,
  mode-aware suggestion rendering, separate caches, Enter auto-selects first
  clan suggestion
- Add clan_name_suggestions() backend view mirroring player suggestions
  (ILIKE on name OR tag, realm-scoped, Redis cached, ordered by prefix match)
- Add pg_trgm GIN indexes on Clan.name and Clan.tag (migration 0048)
- Add 5 frontend tests for HeaderSearch toggle behavior
- Add 5 backend tests for clan suggestion endpoint
- Create runbook-search-toggle.md and update runbook index
